name: Hot Scallop Salad with Potato Chips
recipeInstructions:
- Rinsed and crisped (arugula, Belgian endive, butter lettuce, curly endive, escarole, radicchio, or romaine.)
1. Rinse scallops well, pat dry, and cut crosswise about 1/4 inch thick.
2. Heat oil with ginger in a frying pan over medium-high heat. Add half the scallops; turn often until they are golden and no longer translucent in the center (test by cutting).
3. Transfer scallops to a small bowl. Cook remaining scallops; add to bowl. Drain juices back into pan, bring to boil, then remove from heat. Stir in lime juice, marjoram, sugar, pepper, and onion.
4. Place leaves in a wide, shallow bowl. Pour hot dressing over them, mixing. Push leaves to one side of the bowl. Mound scallops and potato chips separately beside the leaves. Mix salad before serving.
